# SimpleScheduleAI

> AI-powered nurse scheduling managed service for Critical Access Hospitals
> (CAHs, ≤25 beds) in Texas. Reduces nurse overtime, automates callout
> coverage, and ensures Texas nursing compliance.

## Product

SimpleScheduleAI is a web-based scheduling service that helps nurse managers
at small rural hospitals generate optimized nurse schedules, handle last-minute
callouts with ranked replacement shortlists, and maintain audit trails for
regulatory compliance. It is not an EHR; it specializes exclusively in nurse
workforce scheduling.

## Who It's For

- Nurse Managers and Directors of Nursing (DONs) at Critical Access Hospitals
- CAH Administrators and Hospital CEOs focused on reducing labor costs
- Texas hospitals with ≤25 beds and ≤25 full-time nursing staff

## Core Features

- Excel roster upload (no complex IT integration required)
- Three AI-generated schedule drafts: balanced, fairness-optimized, cost-optimized
- Real-time callout replacement shortlist (ranked by availability, compliance, fairness)
- Texas overtime compliance tracking and alerts
- Audit trail logging for regulatory review
